query:
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, emissorMoodys, scoreMatch, rating, numeroEmissaoSnd, numeroEmissaoMoodys
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = '2026-03-30'
ORDER BY scoreMatch ASC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3TCbxwuMo8bqgEH.3d9f28c4dd9f --database ibSgD3x7K24f8UHUmWHZV3 --execute 
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, emissorMoodys, scoreMatch, rating, numeroEmissaoSnd, numeroEmissaoMoodys
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = '2026-03-30'
ORDER BY scoreMatch ASC
LIMIT 20;
